name: Divinity Surprise Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat the egg whites.
3. Fold in the vanilla and chocolate chips.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto a parchment-lined cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 30 minutes at 300°F (150°C).
6. Cool on the parchment paper.
